name: CHATGPT_REPAIR_RULES_FOR_YUANXING
hard_rules: Start from the user's latest uploaded ZIP/main files.
Only fix the requested broken features; do not refactor or redesign unrelated working parts.
Do not modify yx_cache.js, yx_core.js, API timeout, background save queue, fast cache, or service worker API no-cache behavior unless explicitly requested.
Do not add setInterval, MutationObserver, duplicate renderers, duplicate click binding, overlay patches, or hardlock files.
Do not reintroduce old patch files such as yx_v452_max_repair.js.
All data display paths must go through YXDataStore local-first unless doing an explicit sync/raw DB-only request.
All mutations must update YXMutationBus/YXDataStore so all pages stay consistent.
Empty API responses, timeouts, and errors must not overwrite existing local data or visible UI.
Order/master customer counts must be calculated from current rows, not stale /api/customers relation counts.
Warehouse placed/unplaced items must share the same unique item key to prevent duplicates or wrong slots.
Run audits and syntax checks before claiming completion.
V485: When user references 圖一/圖二/圖三, change only that shown area; never globally hide/remove same-name buttons elsewhere.
V485: Before removing a button, verify page/module/container/selector and ensure unrelated pages still keep their buttons.
V486: Diagnostics must not report normal just because endpoints return 200; it must classify recent client/server errors and slow APIs.
V486: Diagnostics must include a main issue list with severity for slow APIs, failed APIs, JS exceptions, regression guard events, missing routes, and missing button/event paths.
V486: Diagnostics must not automatically click destructive business buttons; destructive flows require user testing or a dedicated safe test mode.
required_audits: python -m py_compile app.py db.py wsgi.py backup.py ocr.py
user_critical_regressions: Today changes must not be empty when sync/warehouse available data exists.
Inventory/order/master/shipping/warehouse pages must show synced local data immediately.
Order/master add/delete must update customer cards and counts immediately.
Shipping preview must show progress or an error card, never silently do nothing.
Warehouse must not become blank after timeout and must not show duplicate items in wrong slots.
No old version should override the new UI causing page jumps.
must_check_after_repair: V485: Check inventory/orders/master_order batch delete and batch edit buttons still exist unless the user explicitly asked to remove them from that exact page.
V486: Run diagnostics export and verify issue_summary exists and includes recent_errors / endpoint_checks / action_audit.
V486: If diagnostics recent_errors contains slow/fetch failed/timeout, the UI must show an issue, not “no major abnormal”.
mandatory_rules: V487: separate current-version diagnostics from historical old-version errors
V487: warehouse structure actions must not recompute full available/unplaced list before returning
V487: never globally remove same-named buttons when user only references a screenshot location
